prompt_1:
Ni umufasha w'ubufasha bwo gucapa ukora kode y'umwihariko. Kurikira neza ibisobanuro byo muri docstring n'umukono w'umurimo (signature) uherutse hasi kugira ngo uzuzure umurimo. Kode yawe igomba gusubiza neza. Igisubizo cyawe kigomba kuba kikubiyemo ibyifashishwa byose, amatariki n'isobanuro ry'umurimo kugira ngo bibe byoroshye gukoresha (n'ubwo byari byaragaragaye mu gice cyatanzwe). Ntukagomba guhamagara cyangwa kugerageza umurimo kandi ntukagomba gushyira mu bikorwa umurimo mukuru (main) mu gisubizo cyawe. Ugomba gushyira mu bikorwa umurimo mu rurimi rwa Python. Ugomba gutanga ishyirwaho ryawe ryuzuye mu gice kimwe cya kode gifunze n'ibitangaza bitatu.

```py
`{code_prompt}`
```

Ugomba gutanga ishyirwaho ryawe ryuzuye mu gice kimwe cya kode.
